description_long: This car store is a modern, two-story commercial building with a flat roof and geometric facade elements. The front features two large garage doors and a main entrance, flanked by a lineup of various colored cars and several yellow delivery vans. The facade incorporates a mix of white and black panels, with angular, sculpted details above the main windows. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The building appears to have large glass windows on the ground floor, likely for showroom display, and a rooftop area with visible HVAC units. The overall design is clean and functional, emphasizing vehicle display and easy access for both customers and service vehicles.
description: A modern, two-story car store with a geometric facade, large glass showroom windows, and multiple cars and vans displayed in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two garage doors, a lineup of cars and vans, and large glass windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of yellow vans, the black-and-white facade band, and minimal side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain white wall, geometric black-and-white upper facade, and rooftop details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional parked cars, a small window, and the building's clean, minimalist side.
attribute_displayed_cars: Nine cars and three yellow vans are visibly displayed in front of the building, including sedans and hatchbacks in colors such as red, blue, gold, purple, gray, and white. The cars are arranged in two rows, with vans lined up along the side.
attribute_glass_facade: Large glass windows are present on the ground floor front facade, spanning the width of the showroom area.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, with geometric facade elements and a minimalist color palette
